description_long: This kiosk is a compact, rectangular structure with a flat, overhanging roof and a clean, modern appearance. The front features a large open service window, framed by a thick border, allowing for direct interaction with customers. The sides are solid with one side displaying a large, rectangular window divided into smaller panes, while the other side has a similar but undivided panel. The rear of the kiosk is equipped with a single, narrow door outlined by a dark border and a small handle, providing access for staff. The exterior is primarily finished in light blue and white tones, with metallic or painted trim accentuating the edges and window frames. The overall design is functional and minimal, suitable for urban environments such as sidewalks, parks, or plazas.
description: A compact, modern kiosk with a flat overhanging roof, large front service window, and a single rear door. The exterior is finished in light blue and white with metallic trim.
description_view_0: Front view showing a large open service window with a deep interior and thick framing.
description_view_1: Side view with a large, rectangular window divided into smaller panes and a prominent roof overhang.
description_view_2: Rear view featuring a single, narrow door outlined by a dark border and a small handle.
description_view_3: Opposite side view with a solid panel divided into two sections and a matching roof overhang.
attribute_window_presence: One large rectangular window on the left side, divided into smaller panes; one large open service window at the front.
attribute_door_configuration: One single hinged door at the rear.
attribute_roof_design: Flat roof with a wide overhang, finished in light blue, no visible decorative elements.
attribute_architectural_style: Modern minimalist with functional, clean lines and simple geometric forms.
